# Physical Interface with IPv4 Address
-- interfaces/eth1-1 --
apiVersion: networking.metal.ironcore.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Interface
metadata:
  name: eth1-1
  namespace: default
spec:
  deviceRef:
    name: device
  name: eth1/1
  description: Uplink to Spine
  adminState: Up
  type: Physical
  mtu: 9216
  ipv4:
    addresses:
      - 10.0.100.1/31
-- state --
{
  "openconfig-interfaces:interfaces": {
    "interface": [
      {
        "name": "eth1/1",
        "config": {
          "description": "Uplink to Spine",
          "enabled": true,
          "mtu": 9216,
          "name": "eth1/1",
          "type": "iana-if-type:ethernetCsmacd"
        },
        "subinterfaces": {
          "subinterface": [
            {
              "config": {
                "enabled": true,
                "index": 0
              },
              "index": 0,
              "openconfig-if-ip:ipv4": {
                "addresses": {
                  "address": [
                    {
                      "config": {
                        "ip": "10.0.100.1",
                        "prefix-length": 31,
                        "type": "PRIMARY"
                      },
                      "ip": "10.0.100.1"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "config": {
                  "enabled": true
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
